case.title: OTTINGER v. BRONX GAS & ELECTRIC CO

opinion.h: OTTINGER v. BRONX GAS & ELECTRIC CO, 273 U.S. 772 (1926)
Albert OTTINGER, as Attorney General of the State of New York, appellant, v. The BRONX GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. William L. Ransom, of New York City, for appellee.
Docketed and dismissed with costs on motion of Mr. William L. Ransom for the appellee.
For opinion below, see Bronx Gas & Electric Co. v. Prendergast, 1 F.( 2d) 377.
